meta.question: Does this model contain any parallel execution? (Model ID: 1ad939eef40c461dafae27f75a0586d3)
meta.finalAnswer: The model "Anfrage Bildungsträger" (ID: 1ad939eef40c461dafae27f75a0586d3) does not contain any parallel execution elements. A search for ParallelGateways and tasks with parallel loop types yielded no results; all identified tasks in the model have a loop type of "None".

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?element ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?element tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?definitions .
  ?definitions tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "1ad939eef40c461dafae27f75a0586d3" .
  ?element a ?type .
  FILTER(?type IN (bboExt:ParallelGateway))
  OPTIONAL { ?element bbo:name ?name . }
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The initial query for ParallelGateway using the originalId failed to return results. I will now search for the model by its ID to verify if it exists and then explore its structure to see if parallel execution is represented differently (e.g., via MultiInstance tasks).

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?model ?modelName WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model tai:originalId "1ad939eef40c461dafae27f75a0586d3" .
  OPTIONAL { ?model bbo:name ?modelName . }
}
LIMIT 5

request.reason: The model exists. Now I will check for any ParallelGateway or MultiInstance tasks within this specific model.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?element ?type ?name ?loopType WHERE {
  ?definitions tai:belongsTo <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/model/sid_628f8db4_6e66_4dbc_bf51_0a06087845fd> .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?definitions .
  ?element tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?element a ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?element bbo:name ?name . }
  OPTIONAL { ?element bboExt:loopType ?loopType . }
  FILTER(?type IN (bboExt:ParallelGateway, bboExt:ChoreographyTask))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: The model "Anfrage Bildungsträger" (ID: 1ad939eef40c461dafae27f75a0586d3) does not contain any ParallelGateways or tasks with parallel loop types. All tasks found have a loop type of "None". Therefore, there is no evidence of parallel execution in this model.
